calendar.matters:
Petition For Determinatio Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution.
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Emily Adams.

Mr. Vann stated that the request was only for the pension, that the ex spouse had not appeared, that Ms. Adams was receiving benefits until the ex purported wife sent a letter to U.C., and that the funds were being held. Mr. Vann also presented a copy of a letter with a copy of the marriage certificate between Sallie and Wendell attached. The Court stated that Sallie Nelson was entitled to one half of the commnuity property for the duration of the marriage only, and that Emily (the putative wife) was entitled to the QUASI property. Mr. Vann will prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Maria Letora CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Hill.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for the Petitioner. The Court stated that letters were received from other family members. The Court also indicated that Notice of Ex-parte Communications were given to the parties and attorney. There being no formal objectins and no appearance to object, the court granted the petition appointing Emily Adams as the Executrix and admitted the will. The bond is waived. Order signed in open court.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: A. Aguerre. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
